---
title: 'Hermes: An Integrated CPU/GPU Microarchitecture for IP Routing'
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Yangdong Deng
- Yubei Chen
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/2024724.2024953
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/gpu-microarchitecture-for-ip-routing
journ: DAC
year: 2011
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 3
---
